title: A-wing (disambiguation)
content:
'''A-wing''' may refer to:

==Canon==
[[File:Resistance_A-wing_SWCT.png|thumb|right|250px|An RZ-2 A-wing interceptor]]
*'''[[A-wing starfighter]]'''
**'''[[R-22 Spearhead]]''', original prototype used by the [[Tammuz-an]] planetary defense fleet
**'''[[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]]''', used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]], commonly called the "A-wing"
***'''[[RZ-1T trainer]]''', a model of RZ-1 A-wing interceptor having an additional instructor seat
**'''[[RZ-2 A-wing interceptor]]''', a next-generation version used during the [[First Order-Resistance War]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter|''Aurek''-class tactical strikefighter]]''', the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used during the [[Old Republic era]], unofficially known as "A-wing"
*'''[[Eta-5 interceptor]]''', an interceptor used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] that was also sometimes referred to as an "A-Wing"
*'''[[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]]''', an early predecessor to the [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] that saw active use during years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], nicknamed "A-wing" by some Rebel pilots
*'''[[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]]''', interceptor used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the following governments, commonly known as "A-wing"

{{Disambig}}

|es=Ala-A
|pl=A-wing
}}
